name: Frozen Apple Sauce & Fruit Cup
recipeIngredient: 11 oz Can mandarin orange segments, drained
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium bowl, combine all ingredients.
2. Spoon the fruit mixture into individual dishes or paper cups.
3. Freeze until firm.
4. Remove from freezer about 30 minutes before serving.
7 (1/2 cup) servings.
